@@ -90,9 +90,9 @@

     setError('')
     
-    if (password === CORRECT_PASSWORD) {
+    if (CORRECT_PASSWORD.includes(password)) {
       sessionStorage.setItem('giftpass_auth', 'true')
       setIsAuthenticated(true)
     } else {
       setError('Incorrect password. Please try again.')
